name: chromadb-mcp
description: Chroma vector DB — embedded (local persistent) or client/server; LLM-app-focused; metadata + document storage alongside vectors.

auth.credential_source: Optional — embedded mode has no auth; client/server may use bearer token.

tools.name: vector_authenticate
tools.description: Store Chroma endpoint URL (or 'embedded' for in-process) + optional bearer.

tools.name: vector_create_collection
tools.description: Create a collection with optional embedding function + metadata.

tools.name: vector_upsert
tools.description: Add documents + vectors + metadata. Chroma computes embeddings if not provided.

tools.name: vector_query
tools.description: Query by text or embedding with where-filter + document-content filter.

tools.name: vector_delete
tools.description: Delete documents by id or where-filter.
